name: Agganis Driving School
message: Agganis Driving School offers a comprehensive driving program that includes classes, road tests, and specialized training such as defensive driving techniques. The school provides licensed instructors, a fleet of new vehicles, and flexible scheduling options to accommodate diverse learners. They also offer pre-approved vehicle sponsorship for license tests and a unique Parent Awareness Class. Targeting teens and new drivers, Agganis focuses on delivering an elevated driving education experience tailored for safety and professionalism.
